title: athyrium fraxinifolium
intro: Athyrium fraxinifolium, also known as the lace-leaf fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant is native to East Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Athyrium fraxinifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Athyrium fraxinifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
